case_title: ROBERT DEAN SR VS. VIRGINIA RAMOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,477.58 FILED BY DEAN SR, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT ROMAS, VIRGINIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
